What do you think? …

Jamie I.F. [...] That's why I built Endorsely.

We've reimagined affiliate marketing for modern SaaS companies with one core mission: make it ridiculously easy to launch, scale, and find affiliates to skyrocket your MRR.

What makes us different:

We FIND affiliates for you — Our AI-powered affiliate matchmaking engine identifies ideal partners for your specific SaaS. Simply add your website, and we scan your website, learn about you and your industry, learn about your competitors, and then find the PERFECT-FIT affiliates for your specific brand using our advanced systems. No other tool on the market does this. (This alone saves our agency 100+ hours per week!)

Set up in 10 minutes — Deep Stripe integration means no complex setup. Launch today, not next quarter.

Congrats on the launch! Really cool concept. [...] Congrats on the launch! Really cool concept.

Quick question though - why not let regular people invest their own money instead of using Chapter One's fund? Like, imagine if anyone could throw in $100-1000 and actually share in the upside when these scouts find good deals.

Feels like it'd be way more engaging and actually democratize access to early-stage investing, instead of just being another way for an existing fund to get deal flow.

WILLIAM TJANDRA

Hi Jeff, Congrats on launching this, its a super cool product!

results.title: Firecoach AI: AI roleplays that turn reps into top performers
results.content:
Midori Verity
Firecoach AI

Firecoach AI

@jsa0607 Hi Jerome - we can integrate any CRM. Happy to create a custom roleplay twin of your ideal prospect to check out. Lmk if you're game!

yogeshwar tanwar
Firecoach AI

Firecoach AI

@jsa0607 we can work out SAP CRM for you team , lets connect 

Rutuja Wanjari

Good product, 1 question though -  
How do you keep the methodology scoring accurate—is it just keyword matching, or does it actually evaluate the quality of a rep's response?

Midori Verity
Firecoach AI

Firecoach AI

@rutuja\_wanjari - Great question. Keyword matching is exactly the trap most early AI coaching tools fell into, and it's why reps quickly figured out how to game them by stuffing magic words into every call. [...] → 🔸 Every rep gets visibility into their own weak spots before a manager has to point them out

→ 🔸 Managers see rep-level patterns without adding a single meeting to their calendar

What I find most compelling is what happens after you sign up. Most tools onboard you and disappear. FireCoach runs a PowerSprint where the team comes in, customizes everything to your motion, and stays until adoption is real. That's a fundamentally different kind of commitment.

PS: I've enjoyed being an advisor to the team and truly believe they are a powerhouse combo!

The team is in the comments all day. If something in your sales pipeline is quietly bleeding, go tell em what it is. 🙏

Midori Verity
Firecoach AI

Firecoach AI [...] Where it gets interesting is at the data layer. Once we have hundreds of calls flowing in across segments, we can start showing exactly where a top performer's move travels and where it breaks. Something like: "Rep X's discovery questioning style is correlating with closed-won across both SMB and mid-market, but the pricing dance she uses for SMB is correlating with stalls in enterprise." That kind of pattern map is what we're building toward, and it's the layer that makes the cloning actually safe.

Honestly, this is the part that doesn't exist yet in any tool I've seen. It's why we've intentionally built methodology and segment to be configurable from day one. Generic = useless when you've got a multi-segment team.  
  
So appreciate your great insights and questions! Keep em' comin.
